description_long: This object consists of two full-size computer keyboards, one black and one white, placed side by side. Both keyboards feature a standard QWERTY layout with a numeric keypad and function keys, and several keys are highlighted in red, likely for gaming or shortcut purposes. The keycaps are labeled in English, and the surface of each keyboard is made of hard plastic with a matte finish. The keyboards have angular, modern designs with slightly raised key profiles and visible side cutouts for easy handling. No visible cables or wireless receivers are attached, and there are no brand logos present. The keyboards appear to be in new condition, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of modern, full-size black and white keyboards with red-highlighted keys and English labels, featuring a matte plastic finish and angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both keyboards side by side, with red-highlighted keys clearly visible on the left side of each keyboard.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view from the left, emphasizing the side cutouts and the raised key profiles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edges of both keyboards and the red-highlighted keys on the right side.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view from the right, showing the numeric keypads and the red-highlighted keys on the right side of each keyboard.
